\tzpentry{ID3298}{Matter Stress-Energy Tensor}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3298 introduces Matter Stress-Energy Tensor as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ T^{\mu\nu}_{\rm matter} = \rho\,u^\mu u^\nu + p\,h^{\mu\nu} + q^\mu u^\nu + q^\nu u^\mu + \pi^{\mu\nu}, \]
